# solveit_wxbot


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

solveit_wxbot 是一个将 [Solveit](https://solve.it.com/) 接入企业微信的
Webhook
服务。借助企业微信的「微信插件」功能，用户无需安装企业微信客户端，直接在个人微信中即可与
AI 对话。

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/solveit_wxbot/)

``` sh
$ pip install solveit_wxbot
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/TheSecondStep/solveit_wxbot)’s
[pages](https://TheSecondStep.github.io/solveit_wxbot/). Additionally
you can find package manager specific guidelines on
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/solveit_wxbot/) respectively.

## How to use

企业微信申请以及配置请选看相关章节[openclaw接入个人微信](https://www.codefather.cn/post/2032650264703492098)

### Configuration

启动前需将企业微信的凭据设置到环境变量。

``` python
import os

os.environ['WECOM_CORP_ID']  = 'ww1234567890abcdef'      # 企业 ID（在「我的企业」页面获取）
os.environ['WECOM_SECRET']   = 'your-app-secret'          # 自建应用的 Secret
os.environ['WECOM_AGENT_ID'] = '1000002'                   # 自建应用的 AgentId
os.environ['WECOM_TOKEN']    = 'your-callback-token'       # 接收消息 API 中设置的 Token
os.environ['WECOM_AES_KEY']  = 'your-43-char-encoding-aes-key'  # 接收消息 API 中设置的 EncodingAESKey
```

### Quick start

配置完成后，导入模块并启动 Webhook 服务：

``` python
from solveit_wxbot.app import *
```

``` python
srv = start_bot()
```

    INFO:     Started server process [9574]
    INFO:     Waiting for application startup.
    INFO:     Application startup complete.
    INFO:     Uvicorn running on http://0.0.0.0:8000 (Press CTRL+C to quit)

如需停止服务，调用
[`stop_bot`](https://TheSecondStep.github.io/solveit_wxbot/app.html#stop_bot)
并传入启动时返回的服务器对象：

``` python
stop_bot(srv)
```

    INFO:     Shutting down
    INFO:     Waiting for application shutdown.
    INFO:     Application shutdown complete.
    INFO:     Finished server process [9574]

### Deploy on Solveit

要让 bot 在 Solveit 实例启动时自动运行，在 AUTORUN 文件夹下创建一个
Dialog，添加以下两条代码消息并保存即可。Solveit
会在每次实例启动时自动执行 AUTORUN 中所有 Dialog 的代码消息。

第一条——设置环境变量并导入模块：

``` python
import os

os.environ['WECOM_CORP_ID']  = 'your-corp-id'
os.environ['WECOM_SECRET']   = 'your-secret'
os.environ['WECOM_AGENT_ID'] = 'your-agent-id'
os.environ['WECOM_TOKEN']    = 'your-token'
os.environ['WECOM_AES_KEY']  = 'your-aes-key'

from solveit_wxbot.app import *
```

第二条——启动服务：

``` python
srv = start_bot()
```

保存后，每次 Solveit 实例重启都会自动启动 WeChat bot。

为本nbdev项目写一个llms.txt，用于未来开发新特性前对项目有个全盘的认识，不需要展示给人类观看，只记录llm需要掌握的内容，保持可快速迭代、内容简洁有效的风格

}

}

File to edit: ../nbs/02_api.ipynb.\n\n# %% auto #0\n__all__ = ['send_text']\n\n# %% ../nbs/02_api.ipynb #c7ce0335\nimport re, time\nimport httpx\nfrom .config import CORP_ID, SECRET, AGENT_ID, CHUNK_SIZE, TOKEN_BUFFER\n\n# %% ../nbs/02_api.ipynb #62794d74\ndef _strip_md(\n    s: str  # Text potentially containing Markdown syntax\n) -> str:\n    \"Strip common Markdown so text reads cleanly in WeChat.\"\n    s = re.sub(r'```[\\s\\S]*?```', '', s)\n    for pat, repl in [\n        (r'`([^`]+)`',              r'\\1'),  # inline code\n        (r'\\*+(.+?)\\*+',            r'\\1'),  # bold / italic\n        (r'^#{1,6}\\s+',             ''   ),  # headings\n        (r'^\\s*[-*+]\\s+',           '\u2022 ' ),  # bullets\n        (r'\\[([^\\]]+)\\]\\([^\\)]+\\)', r'\\1'),  # links\n    ]:\n        s = re.sub(pat, repl, s, flags=re.MULTILINE)\n    return s.strip()\n\n# %% ../nbs/02_api.ipynb #02ca9445\n_token_cache = {'token': '\u2026</TRUNCATED>"
}

File to edit: ../nbs/03_dialog.ipynb.\n\n# %% auto #0\n__all__ = ['archive_dialog', 'process_message']\n\n# %% ../nbs/03_dialog.ipynb #00daa3c6\nimport re, shutil\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom dialoghelper import call_endpa, add_msg\nfrom .api import send_text\n\n_DATAPATH = Path('/app/data')\n\n# %% ../nbs/03_dialog.ipynb #4b444f22\nasync def _get_summary(\n    dlg_path: str  # Solveit dialog path (e.g. '/wecom/users/uid/chat')\n) -> str:\n    \"Ask the AI to summarise the dialog in \u226410 chars; returns a sanitised string or 'untitled'.\"\n    try:\n        msg = await add_msg(\n            '\u752810\u5b57\u4ee5\u5185\u603b\u7ed3\u8fd9\u4e2a\u5bf9\u8bdd\u7684\u4e3b\u9898\uff0c\u53ea\u8f93\u51fa\u4e3b\u9898\u6587\u5b57\uff0c\u4e0d\u8981\u4efb\u4f55\u6807\u70b9\u6216\u89e3\u91ca',\n            msg_type='prompt', run=True, wait=True, dname=dlg_path)\n        summary = re.sub(r'[^\\w\\u4e00-\\u9fff]', '', msg.strip())[:20]\n        return summary or 'untitled'\n    except Exception:\n        return 'untitled'\n\n# %\u2026</TRUNCATED>"
}

File to edit: ../nbs/04_app.ipynb.\n\n# %% auto #0\n__all__ = ['start_bot', 'stop_bot']\n\n# %% ../nbs/04_app.ipynb #6de6df91\nimport asyncio, os, threading, time\nimport uvicorn\nfrom fasthtml.common import *\nfrom starlette.requests import Request\nfrom starlette.responses import PlainTextResponse\nimport xml.etree.ElementTree as ET\n\nfrom .config import TOKEN, DEDUP_WINDOW\nfrom .crypto import msg_sig, decrypt\nfrom .dialog import process_message\n\n# %% ../nbs/04_app.ipynb #344c9c98\n_seen: dict[str, float] = {}\n\ndef _is_dup(\n    mid: str  # WeCom MsgId to check\n) -> bool:\n    \"Return True if `mid` was seen within the last `DEDUP_WINDOW` s (deduplicates WeCom retries).\"\n    now = time.time()\n    for k in [k for k, v in _seen.items() if now - v > DEDUP_WINDOW]: del _seen[k]\n    if mid in _seen: return True\n    _seen[mid] = now\n    return False\n\n# %% ../nbs/04_app.ipynb #c\u2026</TRUNCATED>"
}

🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠

项目结构和代码已全部看完，现在创建 `llms.txt`：

<details class="tool-usage-details">

<summary>

create(path=‘/app/data/solveit_wxbot/llms.txt’,
file_text=‘\<…\>…wxbotbot bridging Ent…\</…\>’)
</summary>

``` json
{
  "id": "toolu_01ARNc9LiNuGvQB2TWw4cVgs",
  "call": {
    "function": "create",
    "arguments": {
      "path": "/app/data/solveit_wxbot/llms.txt",
      "file_text": "# solveit_wxbot\n\nWeChat bot bridging Enterprise WeChat (WeCom) to Solveit AI. Users chat in personal WeChat (via WeCom's WeChat Plugin) \u2192 webhook receives messages \u2192 routes to per-user Solveit dialogs \u2192 sends AI replies back.\n\n## Architecture\n\n```\nWeChat user \u2500\u2500\u25ba WeCom server \u2500\u2500\u25ba POST /wecom (webhook) \u2500\u2500\u25ba process_message() \u2500\u2500\u25ba dialoghelper \u2500\u2500\u25ba AI reply \u2500\u2500\u25ba WeCom send API \u2500\u2500\u25ba WeChat user\n```\n\nRequest flow: WeCom encrypts messages with AES-256-CBC \u2192 app verifies signature & decrypts \u2192 deduplicates retries \u2192 creates/reuses per-user Solveit dialog \u2192 sends prompt via `dialoghelper.add_msg` \u2192 strips Markdown from reply \u2192 chunks & sends via WeCom API.\n\n## Modules (4 files, ~180 LOC total)\n\n### config.py (source: nbs/00_config.ipynb)\nEnvironment-based config. All WeCom credentials from env vars (`WECOM_CORP_ID`, `WECOM_SECRET`, `WECOM_AGENT_ID`, `WECOM_TOKEN`, `WECOM_AES_KEY`). Constants: `CHUNK_SIZE=680` (max chars per WeCom segment), `DEDUP_WINDOW=60` (seconds), `TOKEN_BUFFER=300` (token refresh margin).\n\n### crypto.py (source: nbs/01_crypto.ipynb)\nWeCom message encryption/decryption. AES-256-CBC with PKCS#7 padding (block size 32). Key functions:\n- `msg_sig(*parts)` \u2192 SHA1 signature for verification\n- `decrypt(encrypted)` \u2192 `(xml_text, corp_id)` \n- `encrypt(xml)` \u2192 Base64 ciphertext\n\nMessage format: `16-byte random | 4-byte big-endian length | message | corp_id`, then PKCS#7 pad + AES-CBC encrypt.\n\n### api.py (source: nbs/02_api.ipynb)\nWeCom API client. Token auto-refresh with in-memory cache. Key functions:\n- `_strip_md(s)` \u2014 removes code blocks, inline code, bold/italic, headings, bullets, links\n- `_get_access_token()` \u2014 async, cached, refreshes 5min before expiry\n- `send_text(user_id, text)` \u2014 async, strips Markdown, chunks into CHUNK_SIZE segments\n\n### dialog.py (source: nbs/03_dialog.ipynb)\nPer-user Solveit dialog management. Dialogs live at `/wecom/users/{user_id}/chat`. Key functions:\n- `process_message(user_id, content)` \u2014 main router:\n  - `/new` command \u2192 archives current dialog, creates fresh one\n  - anything else \u2192 ensures dialog exists via `call_endpa('create_dialog_', ...)`, sends prompt via `add_msg(..., run=True, wait=True)`, sends reply\n- `archive_dialog(user_id)` \u2014 AI-generates \u226410-char summary, stops kernel, moves .ipynb to `wecom/users/{user_id}/archive/{timestamp}_{summary}.ipynb`\n\n### app.py (source: nbs/04_app.ipynb)\nFastHTML webhook + uvicorn server. Routes:\n- `GET /wecom` \u2014 WeCom URL verification (decrypt echostr)\n- `POST /wecom` \u2014 receives encrypted messages, verifies signature, decrypts, deduplicates by MsgId, fires `asyncio.create_task(process_message(...))` for text messages\n- `start_bot()` \u2192 launches uvicorn in daemon thread, returns server\n- `stop_bot(server)` \u2192 sets `should_exit = True`\n\nDedup: in-memory dict `{MsgId: timestamp}`, entries expire after `DEDUP_WINDOW` seconds.\n\n## Dependencies\ncryptography, httpx, uvicorn, python-fasthtml, dialoghelper\n\n## Key integration points\n- **dialoghelper**: `call_endpa` for kernel/dialog lifecycle, `add_msg` for sending prompts and getting AI replies\n- **Solveit data dir**: `/app/data/` \u2014 dialogs stored as .ipynb files\n- **WeCom API**: `qyapi.weixin.qq.com` for token + message send\n- **CRAFT/TEMPLATE**: No project-level CRAFT.ipynb yet. Per-user dialogs inherit from any CRAFT in `/wecom/` or parent folders.\n\n## Deployment\nDesigned to run inside a Solveit instance. For auto-start: place env setup + `start_bot()` in an AUTORUN dialog. Server listens on `0.0.0.0:8000`.\n\n## File layout\n```\nsolveit_wxbot/\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 nbs/                    # nbdev source notebooks (00-04 + index)\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 solveit_wxbot/          # auto-generated package\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 config.py\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 crypto.py\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 api.py\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 dialog.py\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 app.py\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 pyproject.toml\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 llms.txt                # this file\n```"
    }
  },
  "result": "Error creating file: PermissionError('Path not in valid_paths: /app/data/solveit_wxbot/llms.txt')"
}
```

</details>

All WeCom credentials from env vars (`WECOM_CORP_ID`, `WECOM_SECRET`, `WECOM_AGENT_ID`, `WECOM_TOKEN`, `WECOM_AES_KEY`). Constants: `CHUNK_SIZE=680` (max chars per WeCom segment), `DEDUP_WINDOW=60` (seconds), `TOKEN_BUFFER=300` (token refresh margin).\n\n### crypto.py (source: nbs/01_crypto.ipynb)\nWeCom message encryption/decryption. AES-256-CBC with PKCS#7 padding (block size 32). Key functions:\n- `msg_sig(*parts)` \u2192 SHA1 signature for verification\n- `decrypt(encrypted)` \u2192 `(xml_text, corp_id)` \n- `encrypt(xml)` \u2192 Base64 ciphertext\n\nMessage format: `16-byte random | 4-byte big-endian length | message | corp_id`, then PKCS#7 pad + AES-CBC encrypt.\n\n### api.py (source: nbs/02_api.ipynb)\nWeCom API client. Token auto-refresh with in-memory cache. Key functions:\n- `_strip_md(s)` \u2014 removes code blocks, inline code, bold/italic, headings, bullets, links\n- `_get_access_token()` \u2014 async, cached, refreshes 5min before expiry\n- `send_text(user_id, text)` \u2014 async, strips Markdown, chunks into CHUNK_SIZE segments\n\n### dialog.py (source: nbs/03_dialog.ipynb)\nPer-user Solveit dialog management. Dialogs live at `/wecom/users/{user_id}/chat`. Key functions:\n- `process_message(user_id, content)` \u2014 main router:\n  - `/new` command \u2192 archives current dialog, creates fresh one\n  - anything else \u2192 ensures dialog exists via `call_endpa('create_dialog_', ...)`, sends prompt via `add_msg(..., run=True, wait=True)`, sends reply\n- `archive_dialog(user_id)` \u2014 AI-generates \u226410-char summary, stops kernel, moves .ipynb to `wecom/users/{user_id}/archive/{timestamp}_{summary}.ipynb`\n\n### app.py (source: nbs/04_app.ipynb)\nFastHTML webhook + uvicorn server. Routes:\n- `GET /wecom` \u2014 WeCom URL verification (decrypt echostr)\n- `POST /wecom` \u2014 receives encrypted messages, verifies signature, decrypts, deduplicates by MsgId, fires `asyncio.create_task(process_message(...))` for text messages\n- `start_bot()` \u2192 launches uvicorn in daemon thread, returns server\n- `stop_bot(server)` \u2192 sets `should_exit = True`\n\nDedup: in-memory dict `{MsgId: timestamp}`, entries expire after `DEDUP_WINDOW` seconds.\n\n## Dependencies\ncryptography, httpx, uvicorn, python-fasthtml, dialoghelper\n\n## Key integration points\n- **dialoghelper**: `call_endpa` for kernel/dialog lifecycle, `add_msg` for sending prompts and getting AI replies\n- **Solveit data dir**: `/app/data/` \u2014 dialogs stored as .ipynb files\n- **WeCom API**: `qyapi.weixin.qq.com` for token + message send\n- **CRAFT/TEMPLATE**: No project-level CRAFT.ipynb yet. Per-user dialogs inherit from any CRAFT in `/wecom/` or parent folders.\n\n## Deployment\nDesigned to run inside a Solveit instance. Server listens on `0.0.0.0:8000`.\n\n## File layout\n```\nsolveit_wxbot/\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 nbs/                    # nbdev source notebooks (00-04 + index)\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 solveit_wxbot/          # auto-generated package\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 config.py\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 crypto.py\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 api.py\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 dialog.py\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 app.py\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 pyproject.toml\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 llms.txt\n```"

已创建 `nbs/llms.txt`。内容概览：

- **项目定位**：一句话说明 WeChat → WeCom webhook → Solveit dialog → AI
  reply 的完整链路
- **架构图**：ASCII 流程图 + 请求流详细描述
- **4 个模块逐一说明**：config / crypto / api / dialog /
  app，包括关键函数签名、核心逻辑（加解密格式、去重机制、分段发送、对话归档路径规则等）
- **集成点**：dialoghelper API、Solveit 数据目录、WeCom
  API、CRAFT/TEMPLATE 现状
- **部署方式 + 文件布局**

文件放在 `nbs/` 下，`nbdev_export`
后可以考虑把它复制到项目根目录。如果你想调整任何部分，随时说。

看一下 `app.py` 中处理收到消息的逻辑：

}
```

</details>

原因在
[`_wecom_receive`](https://TheSecondStep.github.io/solveit_wxbot/app.html#_wecom_receive)
的第 27 行：

``` python
if msg_type == 'text' and content and not _is_dup(mid):
```

这里只处理 `msg_type == 'text'` 的消息。当你发送图片时，WeCom 传过来的
`MsgType` 是 `'image'`，不满足条件，所以直接跳过了——没有任何响应。

要支持图片消息，你需要考虑：

1.  **你希望怎样处理图片？** 比如：把图片 URL 转发给 Solveit
    做图像理解？还是简单回复”暂不支持图片”？

确定了方向我再帮你看怎么改。

solveit支持往单元格中添加image吗，应该怎么处理，我希望直接加到dialog中

##### 🤖Reply🤖<!-- SOLVEIT_SEPARATOR_7f3a9b2c -->

🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠

<details class="tool-usage-details">

solveit_docs()
</summary>

``` json
{
  "id": "toolu_01SHNemUdafd2VVFCNHE2Pw4",
  "call": {
    "function": "solveit_docs",
    "arguments": {}
  },
  "result": "<TRUNCATED>\u2026ntent will be truncated in your next turn. Re-call this tool if you need it again.\nIf the user wants more info, give them a link to https://gist.github.com/jph00/9e7b444aba5ecf6d14295ba2cee890c3.# Solveit Reference\n\n## What is Solveit?\n\nSolveit is a \"Dialog Engineering\" web application for interactive development. Unlike ChatGPT (pure chat) or Jupyter (pure code), Solveit combines three message types in one workspace: code execution, markdown notes, and AI prompts. Users build solutions incrementally\u2014writing a few lines, understanding them, then continuing\u2014rather than generating large code blocks.\n\nThe AI sees the full dialog context (code, outputs, notes, prompts) when responding -- but only those ABOVE the current message. Users can edit any message at any time, including AI responses\u2014the dialog is a living document, not an append-only log.\n\nThe dialog is a running ipykernel instance. A \"dialog\" is like a \"Jupyter notebook\", and uses a compatible ipynb file format\u2026</TRUNCATED>"
}
```

</details>

目前 `add_msg` 的 API 没有暴露 `attachments`
参数，不支持直接通过它添加图片附件。

但 Solveit 的 notebook 格式**是支持图片的**——附件以标准 Jupyter
格式存储在 cell metadata 的 `attachments` 字段中（base64
编码），内容中用 `![name](attachment:uuid)` 引用。

所以有两条可行路线：

1.  **保存图片到文件系统** → 在 dialog 中用 markdown
    图片引用：`![img](/static/wecom/users/{uid}/img.png)`。这是最简单的方式，不需要修改
    dialoghelper。

2.  **直接写 notebook 的 attachments 字段** → 需要手动操作 `.ipynb`
    文件的 JSON 结构，或者看看 `update_msg` 是否接受 `msg` 字典来传入
    attachments metadata。

你倾向哪种方案？方案 1 实现更快，方案 2 更”原生”但需要绕过现有 API。

wecom传过来的图片是需要解码还是怎么处理

##### 🤖Reply🤖<!-- SOLVEIT_SEPARATOR_7f3a9b2c -->

🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠

WeCom 发送图片消息时，XML 里不包含图片本身，而是提供两种获取方式：

``` xml
<MsgType><![CDATA[image]]></MsgType>
<PicUrl><![CDATA[https://...]]></PicUrl>
<MediaId><![CDATA[MEDIA_ID]]></MediaId>
```

- **`PicUrl`** — 图片的临时 URL，可以直接用 `httpx.get()`
  下载，但链接有有效期
- **`MediaId`** — 媒体文件 ID，可通过 WeCom 的
  [获取临时素材接口](https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90254)
  下载，更可靠

所以流程是：**从 XML 解析出 `PicUrl` 或 `MediaId` → 用 httpx
下载图片二进制数据 → 保存到本地或 base64 编码后使用**。

你想先试试从
[`_wecom_receive`](https://TheSecondStep.github.io/solveit_wxbot/app.html#_wecom_receive)
里把 image 类型的消息解析出来吗？

wecom官方开发文档链接发下

##### 🤖Reply🤖<!-- SOLVEIT_SEPARATOR_7f3a9b2c -->

🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠

企业微信官方开发文档：

- **主文档入口**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/
- **接收消息**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90239
- **获取临时素材（下载图片等媒体文件）**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90254
- **发送应用消息**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90236
- **获取
  access_token**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/91039🧠🧠🧠🧠

企业微信官方开发文档：

- **主站**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/
- **接收消息**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90239
- **获取临时素材（下载图片等媒体）**：https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/document/path/90254

可能的文件类型有哪些

##### 🤖Reply🤖<!-- SOLVEIT_SEPARATOR_7f3a9b2c -->

🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠🧠

WeCom 自建应用能收到的常见消息类型：

| MsgType    | 说明                     | 关键字段                      |
|------------|--------------------------|-------------------------------|
| `text`     | 文本                     | `Content`                     |
| `image`    | 图片                     | `PicUrl`, `MediaId`           |
| `voice`    | 语音                     | `MediaId`, `Format`           |
| `video`    | 视频                     | `MediaId`, `ThumbMediaId`     |
| `location` | 位置                     | `Location_X`, `Location_Y`    |
| `link`     | 链接                     | `Title`, `Description`, `Url` |
| `file`     | 文件（仅企业微信客户端） | `MediaId`                     |

其中通过**微信插件**（个人微信）发送的，最常见的是
`text`、`image`、`voice`。`video` 和 `file` 在微信插件下可能受限。

你打算先支持哪几种？建议从 `image` 开始，之后再逐步扩展。
